articles.title: India-based Tanishq jewelry opens its first store in the Northeast
articles.description:
The brand's U.S. expansion aims to capture the business of India’s largest diaspora, which continues to grow in the region.

The post India-based Tanishq jewelry opens its first store in the Northeast appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Tanishq jewelry opens its first Northeast store in Boston, targeting local Indian diaspora.
The store aims to serve the growing Indian community in the region.
Local residents can access a wider range of culturally significant jewelry options.

articles.title: NH athlete is running Boston for the care that keeps her breathing
articles.description:
"I am running the Boston Marathon because I can run, and I can run thanks to the excellent care I have received as a patient at Mass Eye and Ear."

The post NH athlete is running Boston for the care that keeps her breathing appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NH athlete Alison Clode is running the Boston Marathon to honor Mass Eye and Ear's care.
Clode attributes her ability to run to the excellent treatment received at Mass Eye and Ear.
Her story highlights the importance of local healthcare services for Boston residents.

articles.title: A major North Shore office park is adding 60 new condos
articles.description:
With steady demand from 55-plus buyers looking to downsize, nearly half the units in the unfinished building are already claimed.

The post A major North Shore office park is adding 60 new condos appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: North Shore office park is adding 60 new condos to meet demand.
Nearly half of the units are already claimed by 55-plus buyers.
This development addresses the growing need for downsizing options in Boston.
